title: Looking for a clean angel death sound
display_title: Looking for a clean angel death sound
wikitext:
[]: Looking for a clean angel death sound.             Quote Post by etjusticepourtous » Thu Jul 01, 2010 6:38 pm I'm looking a clean sound of when the angels die, where you hear a evangelical chorus sing ahhhhh. Really appreciate it.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Jul 01, 2010 9:01 pm I'm not sure that they all have that sound effect... Rebuild or Oldvangelion? Which Angel in particular do you remember it from? EDIT: Hmm... From the video, it seemed like the sound effect was from something else, not the music track on the DVD. Very well, I will search through the other angel deaths. EDIT: Not the exact sound effect, but in 2.0 when the "Angel of Might" is fighting Mari in 02, there are certain sound effects that sound very similar if you want to check that out.

[]:             Quote Post by etjusticepourtous » Thu Jul 01, 2010 9:06 pm Here's an example, but it has background noise. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v8Sg7bN_s6s

Article: Looking for a clean angel death sound
[]: Looking for a clean angel death sound.             Quote Post by etjusticepourtous » Thu Jul 01, 2010 6:38 pm I'm looking a clean sound of when the angels die, where you hear a evangelical chorus sing ahhhhh. Really appreciate it.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Jul 01, 2010 9:01 pm I'm not sure that they all have that sound effect... Rebuild or Oldvangelion? Which Angel in particular do you remember it from? EDIT: Hmm... From the video, it seemed like the sound effect was from something else, not the music track on the DVD. Very well, I will search through the other angel deaths. EDIT: Not the exact sound effect, but in 2.0 when the "Angel of Might" is fighting Mari in 02, there are certain sound effects that sound very similar if you want to check that out.
